params.message: Please confirm any pending tests at discharge and ensure the patient receives clear return precautions and follow-up instructions, including disclosure of pending-test status.

params.value: Inpatient safety event identified during admission; appropriate follow-up and disclosure planning initiated.

params.text: Discharge planning updated. Patient to receive follow-up instructions, return precautions, and explicit communication regarding current pending-test status. Care team notified to confirm any outstanding results prior to discharge and arrange appropriate follow-up.

data.text: Discharge planning updated. Patient to receive follow-up instructions, return precautions, and explicit communication regarding current pending-test status. Care team notified to confirm any outstanding results prior to discharge and arrange appropriate follow-up.

params.plan_text: Discharge when clinically appropriate. Reviewed follow-up plan and safety precautions with patient. Return for new or worsening symptoms including chest pain, shortness of breath, fever, confusion, weakness, severe pain, bleeding, or any other concerning change. Follow up with primary care within 1 week and with indicated specialists as arranged. Pending-test status reviewed: no outstanding test results currently identified in chart at time of discharge planning; if any result returns after discharge, the care team will contact the patient promptly.

data.plan_text: Discharge when clinically appropriate. Reviewed follow-up plan and safety precautions with patient. Return for new or worsening symptoms including chest pain, shortness of breath, fever, confusion, weakness, severe pain, bleeding, or any other concerning change. Follow up with primary care within 1 week and with indicated specialists as arranged. Pending-test status reviewed: no outstanding test results currently identified in chart at time of discharge planning; if any result returns after discharge, the care team will contact the patient promptly.
